sentence: 他刚晋升为上尉，很高兴。
pinyin: Tā gāng jìnshēng wéi shàngwèi, hěn gāoxìng.
english: He was just promoted to captain and is very happy.

sentence: 我高中时觉得代数很难学。
pinyin: Wǒ gāozhōng shí juéde dàishù hěn nán xué.
english: I found algebra very hard to learn in high school.

sentence: 客人在门厅脱鞋换拖鞋。
pinyin: Kèrén zài méntīng tuō xié huàn tuōxié.
english: Guests take off their shoes and put on slippers in the entrance hall.

sentence: 他们婚前已经认识了五年。
pinyin: Tāmen hūnqián yǐjīng rènshi le wǔ nián.
english: They had already known each other for five years before getting married.

meaning: 1. tempest; 2. wave (of popular sentiment etc); 3. craze or fad
sentence: 最近掀起了一股露营风潮。
pinyin: Zuìjìn xiānqǐ le yī gǔ lùyíng fēngcháo.
english: A camping craze has swept through recently.

sentence: 爷爷喜欢在市场上淘古玩。
pinyin: Yéye xǐhuān zài shìchǎng shàng táo gǔwán.
english: Grandpa likes hunting for antiques at the market.

meaning: 1. rad (unit of absorbed dose of ionizing radiation) (loanword)
sentence: 辐射剂量以拉德为单位来计算。
pinyin: Fúshè jìliàng yǐ lādé wéi dānwèi lái jìsuàn.
english: Radiation dose is calculated in units of rads.

sentence: 她不接受别人说她是女流之辈。
pinyin: Tā bù jiēshòu biérén shuō tā shì nǚliú zhī bèi.
english: She does not accept being dismissed as just a woman.

meaning: 1. queen; 2. empress; 3. imperial concubine; 4. Goddess, esp. Xi Wangm
sentence: 庙里供奉的是送子娘娘。
pinyin: Miào lǐ gòngfèng de shì sòngzǐ Niángniáng.
english: The temple enshrines the Goddess of Fertility.

sentence: 她戴上面纱走进了婚礼现场。
pinyin: Tā dàishàng miànshā zǒujìn le hūnlǐ xiànchǎng.
english: She put on her veil and walked into the wedding venue.

sentence: 孩子喜欢在本子上贴贴纸。
pinyin: Háizi xǐhuān zài běnzi shàng tiē tiēzhǐ.
english: Kids love putting stickers on their notebooks.

meaning: 1. to rise to the sky; 2. to lift off; 3. to levitate; 4. liftoff
sentence: 火箭顺利升空，全场欢呼。
pinyin: Huǒjiàn shùnlì shēngkōng, quánchǎng huānhū.
english: The rocket lifted off successfully and the whole venue cheered.

sentence: 他把旧书箱搬到了阁楼里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ jiù shūxiāng bān dào le gélóu lǐ.
english: He moved the old book boxes up to the attic.

sentence: 这座桥耗资二十亿元才建成。
pinyin: Zhè zuò qiáo hàozī èrshí yì yuán cái jiànchéng.
english: This bridge cost two billion yuan to build.

sentence: 狭义上的教育指学校里的教学。
pinyin: Xiáyì shàng de jiàoyù zhǐ xuéxiào lǐ de jiàoxué.
english: In the narrow sense, education refers to classroom teaching at school.

sentence: 公司提供了一套合同模板供参考。
pinyin: Gōngsī tígōng le yī tào hétóng múbǎn gōng cānkǎo.
english: The company provided a set of contract templates for reference.

sentence: 自行车的链条松了需要调整。
pinyin: Zìxíngchē de liàntiáo sōng le xūyào tiáozhěng.
english: The bicycle chain is loose and needs to be adjusted.

meaning: 1. to lay (railroad tracks, carpet, pipeline); 2. to install (wiring,
sentence: 工人正在铺设新的地下管道。
pinyin: Gōngrén zhèngzài pūshè xīn de dìxià guǎndào.
english: Workers are laying new underground pipelines.

sentence: 国王端坐在王座上接受朝拜。
pinyin: Guówáng duānzuò zài wángzuò shàng jiēshòu cháobài.
english: The king sat upright on the throne receiving obeisance.

sentence: 祭司主持了神庙的开幕仪式。
pinyin: Jìsī zhǔchí le shénmiào de kāimù yíshì.
english: The priest presided over the opening ceremony of the temple.

sentence: 她和前夫分开后搬去了上海。
pinyin: Tā hé qiánfū fēnkāi hòu bān qù le Shànghǎi.
english: After separating from her ex-husband, she moved to Shanghai.

sentence: 他的作品至今被视为不朽经典。
pinyin: Tā de zuòpǐn zhìjīn bèi shì wéi bùxiǔ jīngdiǎn.
english: His works are still regarded as enduring classics today.

meaning: 1. to succeed to the throne; 2. accession
sentence: 新王即位后宣布减免赋税。
pinyin: Xīn wáng jíwèi hòu xuānbù jiǎnmiǎn fùshuì.
english: After the new king ascended the throne, he announced tax reductions.

sentence: 她的笑容清纯可爱，让人心情好。
pinyin: Tā de xiàoróng qīngchún kě'ài, ràng rén xīnqíng hǎo.
english: Her smile is fresh and pure, making people feel happy.

sentence: 他在比赛最后一分钟打进了入球。
pinyin: Tā zài bǐsài zuìhòu yī fēnzhōng dǎjìn le rùqiú.
english: He scored a goal in the last minute of the match.

sentence: 两国是关系密切的盟国。
pinyin: Liǎng guó shì guānxi mìqiē de méngguó.
english: The two countries are close allies.

sentence: 今年夏天的雨量比往年多很多。
pinyin: Jīnnián xiàtiān de yǔliàng bǐ wǎngnián duō hěn duō.
english: This summer's rainfall is much higher than in previous years.

meaning: 1. to move (from one residence to another)
sentence: 退休后他们迁居到了海边小镇。
pinyin: Tuìxiū hòu tāmen qiānjū dào le hǎibiān xiǎozhèn.
english: After retiring, they moved to a small seaside town.

meaning: 1. one's character; 2. fret (on fingerboard of lute or guitar)
sentence: 老师说一个人的品格比成绩更重要。
pinyin: Lǎoshī shuō yī gè rén de pǐngé bǐ chéngjì gèng zhòngyào.
english: The teacher said a person's moral character is more important than grades.

meaning: 1. to win a tender; 2. successful bidder
sentence: 我们公司顺利中标了这个项目。
pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī shùnlì zhòngbiāo le zhège xiàngmù.
english: Our company successfully won the bid for this project.

meaning: 1. to insult; 2. to revile; 3. abuse; 4. vituperation
sentence: 网络上不应该随意辱骂他人。
pinyin: Wǎngluò shàng bù yīnggāi suíyì rǔmà tārén.
english: People should not casually insult others online.

sentence: 遇到困难要及时求助，不要轻生。
pinyin: Yùdào kùnnán yào jíshí qiúzhù, bùyào qīngshēng.
english: When facing difficulties, seek help in time and don't take your own life.

sentence: 他因为超速被处以一千元罚金。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi chāosù bèi chǔyǐ yīqiān yuán fájīn.
english: He was fined one thousand yuan for speeding.

sentence: 这部剧的收视率创了新高。
pinyin: Zhè bù jù de shōushì lǜ chuàng le xīn gāo.
english: The viewership ratings for this drama hit a new high.

sentence: 健康的性关系建立在相互尊重的基础上。
pinyin: Jiànkāng de xìngguānxi jiànlì zài xiānghù zūnzhòng de jīchǔ shàng.
english: A healthy sexual relationship is built on mutual respect.

sentence: 工厂开始批量生产这款新手机。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng kāishǐ pīliàng shēngchǎn zhè kuǎn xīn shǒujī.
english: The factory has begun mass-producing this new phone.

sentence: 他把记录器固定在车里，记录行车数据。
pinyin: Tā bǎ jìlùqì gùdìng zài chē lǐ, jìlù xíngchē shùjù.
english: He fixed the recorder in the car to log driving data.

sentence: 氢和氧化合就会生成水。
pinyin: Qīng hé yǎng huàhé jiù huì shēngchéng shuǐ.
english: Hydrogen and oxygen combine chemically to form water.

meaning: Dharma (the teachings of the Buddha); Buddhist doctrine
sentence: 她最近开始学习佛法，心里平静多了。
pinyin: Tā zuìjìn kāishǐ xuéxí Fófǎ, xīn lǐ píngjìng duō le.
english: She recently started studying the Dharma and feels much more at peace.

meaning: spring breeze; (fig.) pleasant demeanor; serene atmosphere; favorable
sentence: 一阵春风吹来，花香弥漫了整条街。
pinyin: Yī zhèn chūnfēng chuī lái, huāxiāng mímàn le zhěng tiáo jiē.
english: A spring breeze blew through, spreading the scent of flowers all along the street.

meaning: blessed land; a place rich in beauty or natural resources etc; (term o
sentence: 这个小村庄山清水秀，真是一块宝地。
pinyin: Zhège xiǎo cūnzhuāng shān qīng shuǐ xiù, zhēn shì yī kuài bǎodì.
english: This little village has beautiful mountains and clear water — it's truly a blessed land.

sentence: 我们用视讯开了一个小时的会议。
pinyin: Wǒmen yòng shìxùn kāi le yī gè xiǎoshí de huìyì.
english: We held an hour-long video conference.

meaning: memorial activity 35 days after a person's death
sentence: 家人在他过世后五七那天一起祭拜。
pinyin: Jiārén zài tā guòshì hòu wǔqī nà tiān yīqǐ jìbài.
english: The family gathered to pay their respects on the 35th day after his passing.

meaning: human lifespan; life insurance (abbr. for 人壽保險|人寿保险[ren2 shou4 bao3 xi
sentence: 他刚买了一份人寿保险，保额很高。
pinyin: Tā gāng mǎi le yī fèn rénshòu bǎoxiǎn, bǎo'é hěn gāo.
english: He just bought a life insurance policy with a very high coverage amount.

sentence: 买桌布前先量一下桌子的长宽。
pinyin: Mǎi zhuōbù qián xiān liáng yīxià zhuōzi de cháng kuān.
english: Before buying a tablecloth, measure the length and width of the table first.

sentence: 这个项目需要先报批规划局才能动工。
pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù xūyào xiān bàopī guīhuàjú cái néng dònggōng.
english: This project needs approval from the planning department before construction can begin.

meaning: alternative name; to refer to sth by another name; antonomasia
sentence: 「神州」是中国的代称，常见于诗词中。
pinyin: "Shénzhōu" shì Zhōngguó de dàichēng, chángjiàn yú shīcí zhōng.
english: "Shenzhou" is an alternative name for China, often seen in classical poetry.

sentence: 附近的集镇每逢周末都会有早市。
pinyin: Fùjìn de jízhèn měi féng zhōumò dōu huì yǒu zǎoshì.
english: The nearby town holds a morning market every weekend.

meaning: to proclaim oneself (sth); to give oneself the title of; self-appointe
sentence: 他自封为队长，其实没人选他。
pinyin: Tā zìfēng wéi duìzhǎng, qíshí méi rén xuǎn tā.
english: He proclaimed himself team captain, but nobody actually elected him.

sentence: 这份工作年薪二十万，福利也不错。
pinyin: Zhè fèn gōngzuò niánxīn èrshí wàn, fúlì yě bùcuò.
english: This job pays an annual salary of 200,000 with good benefits too.
